instruction: I've compiled papers and books with links in this spreadsheet. Help me download the PDF of the first paper, save it as "paper01.pdf" in the /home/user directory. Additionally, I would like to know which paper in my list cites the initial one. Please determine and document the title saved as "ans.docx" in the same directory.

evaluator.eval: compare_pdfs(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/paper01.pdf', 'dest': 'paper01.pdf'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/multi_apps/68a25bd4-59c7-4f4d-975e-da0c8509c848/paper01.pdf', 'dest': 'paper01_Gold.pdf'})) and compare_docx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/ans.docx', 'dest': 'ans.docx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/multi_apps/68a25bd4-59c7-4f4d-975e-da0c8509c848/ans.docx', 'dest': 'ans_Gold.docx'}))
